applicationNote: Apply through the myNSFAS portal at www.nsfas.org.za before the national closing date.

additionalFunding.name: NWU Chancellor's Medal
additionalFunding.criteria: Top matric achievers; APS 36+; any of the three campuses

additionalFunding.name: NWU Merit Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: APS 30+; relevant subject performance per faculty

additionalFunding.name: NWU Sport Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: National or provincial sport representation; Pukke/Eagles team member

additionalFunding.name: NWU Language Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Students studying Setswana, Afrikaans or isiZulu as main language
